"D:/Work/_Project/ferma_compose2/data/src/main/java/com/zaroslikov/data/room/converter/CategoryConverter.kt" }, "keyToStringList": { "ExportApk.BuildVariants": [ "release" ], "com.android.tools.idea.sqlite.queryhistory": [ "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN price_all IS NULL THEN price ELSE price_all END), 0) AS ResultCount FROM expenses_table WHERE idPT='3'", "SELECT count, count_suffix AS suffix, price, price_all, category, buyer, date, category_finance FROM ( SELECT count, count_suffix, price, price_all, category, buyer, DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) AS date, category_finance FROM ( SELECT count, count_suffix, price, price_all, category, buyer, day, month, year, 0 AS category_finance FROM sale_table WHERE idPT='1' and title='Какашки' UNION All SELECT count, count_suffix, NULL AS price, NULL AS price_all, category, NULL AS buyer, day, month, year, 5 AS category_finance FROM add_table WHERE idPT='1' and title='Какашки' UNION All SELECT count, count_suffix, price, price_all, category, NULL AS buyer, day, month, year, 2 AS category_finance FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT='1' and title='Какашки' and status = 0 UNION All SELECT count, count_suffix, price, price_all, category, NULL AS buyer, day, month, year, 3 AS category_finance FROM write_off_table WHERE idPT='1' and title='Какашки' and status = 1) WHERE DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) BETWEEN DATE('2020-01-01') AND DATE('2026-01-01')) ORDER BY date DESC", "SELECT title, count, count_suffix as suffix, price, printf('%02d.%02d.%04d', day, month, year) as date, category FROM (SELECT title, count, count_suffix, Case WHEN price_all = null THEN price ELSE price_all END as price, day, month, year, 2 AS category From sale_table Where idPT='1' and DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) BETWEEN DATE('2025-11-01') AND DATE('2025-11-30') UNION All SELECT title,count, count_suffix, -(Case WHEN price_all = null THEN price ELSE price_all END) AS minusPriceAll, day, month, year, 1 AS category from expenses_table Where idPT='1' and DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) BETWEEN DATE('2025-11-01') AND DATE('2025-11-30') UNION All SELECT name, (Select Count From animal_count_table Where animal_id = a.id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1 ), 'Шт.', -0 AS minusPriceAll,substr(date, 1, 2) AS day, substr(date, 4, 2) AS month, substr(date, 7, 4) AS year, 1 AS category from animal_table a Where idPT='1' and DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) BETWEEN DATE('2025-11-01') AND DATE('2025-11-30')) combined_table ORDER BY date DESC", "SELECT v.id, v.vaccination, v.count_vaccination, v.date, v.next_vaccination, v.note, v.animal_id, e.price, e.price_all FROM animal_vaccination_table AS v LEFT JOIN expenses_table AS e ON e.animal_vaccination_id = v.animal_id WHERE animal_id='1' ORDER BY DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', substr(date, 7, 4), substr(date, 4, 2), substr(date, 1, 2))) DESC, id DESC", "SELECT * from sale_table Where idPT='1' and title ='Наруто' ORDER BY DATE(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', year, month, day)) DESC" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "KND" ] } }
